raw_consumer_statement:
I bought a desk on-line from XXXX XXXX for {$540.00} using a Citi credit card. That same day, I reached out to XXXX XXXX to cancel the order after reading the bad reviews from other customers. 

The seller told me that the order shipped already and instructed me to refuse delivery of the item. I followed their instructions and the desk was returned ( see tracking order details and proof attached ). 

Unfortunately, XXXX XXXX did not refund me for the desk so I filed a dispute with Citi, the card I used for the transaction. 

However, in spite of the fact that I have proof from XXXX tracking that the desk was returned, Citi still decided in favor of the merchant.
